digest.greeting: Good morning, Jean. Today is Wednesday, July 22, and the day is anchored by Legal Change Management at 10:00 AM, three portfolio/team 1:1s, EPMO Team Meeting attorney-client privilege training, CoE, and Jean/Sara. There are 9 calendar blocks, 5 carried-over items, 2 active reminders, and 3 urgent priorities: keep LevelPath UAT/SSO readiness moving before the July 24 go-live, close the project-folder and Salesforce support follow-ups, and protect decision capture during a compressed afternoon. Teams and SharePoint transcript collection were rate-limited, so this brief relies on Outlook Calendar, recent Outlook Email, reminders, and GitHub dashboard history.

items.label: Track LevelPath UAT and SSO readiness before go-live
items.detail: LevelPath remains the highest-risk carry-forward item. UAT has moved forward, go-live is still targeted for July 24, and production SSO still needs confirmation before the path is fully clear.

items.label: Confirm the CoE newsletter owner and status
items.detail: The CoE newsletter follow-up remains unresolved. Confirm who owns the next send and whether anything is needed before the weekly recap cadence continues.

items.label: Follow up with Katie about the missing File Release project
items.detail: Clarify why the File Release project is not showing and what Katie needs next. This remains open from the prior dashboard history.

items.label: Lock next steps from the Jhara and Mental Health meetings
items.detail: Carry forward any owners, milestones, or blockers that still need to be captured from Jhara's portfolio roadblocks discussion and the Mental Health project meeting.

items.label: Prepare the CSC Portfolio follow-up path
items.detail: Keep the CSC portfolio scope, expected decisions, and first follow-up owner moving after the initial review with Hassan.

items.label: Hacer follow up al equipo sobre los folders de los proyectos listos para este viernes
items.detail: Use today's 11:30 AM blocked space or the late-afternoon capture window to confirm who owns each project folder and what must be ready by Friday.

items.label: Comentarle a Janet  que ya hable con Nicolas sobre apoyo en proyecto de Salesforce
items.detail: Close the loop with Janet after the morning 1:1s so the Salesforce support path is clear before the afternoon meeting stack.

items.label: Legal Change Management - IT & EPMO Sync
items.detail: Recurring EPMO and IT SharePoint alignment with Jhara, Carlos, Madhu, Santiago, and Jean listed. Best first anchor for open action items, doubts, and clarification needs.

items.label: 1:1 Thiago & Jean
items.detail: Use this as the cleanest Amazon Connect and Skills follow-up window after yesterday's planning was marked complete.

items.label: 1:1 Maria & Jean
items.detail: Agenda is portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps. Tie it to CoE newsletter ownership, project-folder readiness, and any follow-up from prior Mental Health work.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: A 90-minute protected window before the afternoon stack. Use it for project-folder follow-up, LevelPath checks, and Salesforce support alignment.

items.label: EPMO Team Meeting
items.detail: Special topic is Maintaining Attorney Client Privilege with Chelsea Schinnour, plus recognition, updates, and reminders. Capture any legal/process implications that affect project work.

items.label: Focus time
items.detail: Only 30 minutes between EPMO Team Meeting and Laura. Use it for quick capture, not deep work.

items.label: 1:1 Laura & Jean
items.detail: Good window to check LevelPath readiness, SMS Automation status, or any portfolio follow-up that needs Laura's context.

items.label: CoE Biweekly Touchpoint overlaps preparation focus time
items.detail: CoE Biweekly Touchpoint and focus time both run at 4:00 PM. Decide whether the CoE conversation needs Jean live or whether the focus block should be protected.

items.label: Jean/Sara 1:1
items.detail: End-of-day leadership capture point after EPMO, CoE, and 1:1s. Bring decisions, unresolved owners, and Friday readiness risks.

items.label: Use the midday block for Friday-readiness follow-ups
items.detail: The 12:00 PM protected space is the best window to confirm project-folder readiness, LevelPath SSO/UAT status, and any Salesforce support handoff before meetings resume.

items.label: Capture project implications from attorney-client privilege training
items.detail: Chelsea Schinnour is the EPMO Team Meeting special guest. Note any process, documentation, or communication changes that should affect Legal Change Management, CoE, or portfolio work.

items.label: Triage the new CM-CoE follow-up/no-help intake
items.detail: Recent Asana email shows a new intake for Follow Up & No Help Pick List reasons and a project invite around that work. Decide whether this is a real intake needing prioritization or a test artifact that should be cleaned up.

items.label: Confirm whether the CM-CoE intake alert is actionable
items.detail: Janet sent a New Intake Alert for Other and Asana shared the related project. The visible content looks test-like, so confirm whether it needs action before it clutters the active evaluation queue.

items.label: Jhara is out Thursday and Friday
items.detail: Calendar shows Jhara out of office from Thursday, July 23 through Friday, July 24. Close Legal Change Management or portfolio follow-ups with her today where possible.

items.label: Jhara out of office starts
items.detail: Plan around Jhara being OOO Thursday and Friday.

items.label: Amazon Connect Weekly Project Sync
items.detail: Agenda includes open items, blockers, prior action items, and decisions needed. Use today to clarify what must be ready for that sync.

items.label: Weekly Meeting: BCP/Incident Response
items.detail: Regular BCP/Incident Response touchpoint. Prepare any open risks or owner decisions after today's capture.

items.label: SMS Automation Optimization Weekly Project Status
items.detail: Agenda includes progress, priorities, resources, risks, blockers, and next steps.

items.label: Tudo Bem!'s Weekly Meeting
items.detail: Main team coordination forum for progress, roadblocks, and shared learning.
